trend.summary: Multiple fictional engineering voices describe the merge queue as a changing weather system with pressure, radar, forecasts, and brief green windows.
trend.memeMechanic: Routine delivery friction is narrated with overly serious weather-report language, turning review latency into a shared forecast ritual.
trend.teamConnection: The joke is specific to a coding-agent team that watches tests, reviews, and merge readiness move together during a shipping day.
visualMetaphors: forecast symbols built from terminal glyphs
trend.reason: The pattern recurs across more than three independent fictional authors and can be translated into original visual language without copying a post or identity.

candidates.title: Review Barometer Field Sweatshirt
candidates.rationale: An asymmetric offset ledger maps the joke through branching queue lines, a clearing boundary, check marks, and concentric sleeve rings with crosshairs and accent notches.

front.subline: TENSION SETTLES WHEN THE NARROW SLOT CLEARS

back.subline: A FICTIONAL FORECAST FOR PATIENT SHIPPING CREWS

sleeves.motif: THREE CONCENTRIC RINGS WITH A CROSSHAIR AND MIRRORED ACCENT NOTCH
sleeves.caption: MERGE CLIMATE / FIELD UNIT

candidates.visualPrompt: Flat six-placement garment system with an asymmetric offset text block, branching queue lines on the left, a clearing boundary, checks on the right, and concentric sleeve rings with a crosshair and accent notch.

candidates.title: Approval Barometer Station Sweatshirt
candidates.rationale: A centered system uses vertical pinstripes, a rectangular aperture, side connectors, and ladder sleeves made from two rails and nine rungs.

front.subline: COMPACT CHANGES EASE ATMOSPHERIC REVIEW LOAD

back.subline: MEASURED IN CHECKS, COMMENTS, AND PATIENT REBASES

sleeves.motif: TWO VERTICAL RAILS WITH NINE RUNGS AND ONE ACCENT RUNG
sleeves.caption: BAROMETER STUDY / 01

candidates.visualPrompt: Flat six-placement garment system centered on one central axis, with vertical pinstripes, a rectangular aperture and side connectors, plus ladder sleeves with rails and rungs.

candidates.title: Quiet Passage Map Sweatshirt
candidates.rationale: A left-weighted split field and vertical accent divider organize nested angular isobar contours with abstract shape-only sleeve nodes.

front.subline: A NARROW OPENING BETWEEN REVIEW FRONTS

back.subline: FOLLOW THE CHECKS THROUGH THE QUIET CORRIDOR

sleeves.motif: STACKED ABSTRACT SHAPE-ONLY NODES WITH NO SEMANTIC COPY
sleeves.caption: WINDOW MAP / TEST FIELD

candidates.visualPrompt: Flat six-placement garment system with a left-weighted split field, vertical accent divider, three nested angular isobar contours, and abstract shape-only sleeve nodes.

strengths: The forecast mechanic is visible across body and sleeves without becoming a poster.
The panel system uses a restrained field, clear type hierarchy, and one controlled accent.
All visible language and marks are fictional, original, and short enough for local rendering.
visualCritic.revisionBrief: No blocking revision. Preserve the current scale, negative space, and sleeve-to-body continuity during final export.
